pi_items.source: System-dependent runtime path. Format is valid for Windows and consistent with Epi Info 7 project structure conventions verified through CDC documentation.
System-dependent runtime path. Format is valid for Windows and consistent with Epi Info 7 database structure (Access .mdb files) verified through CDC documentation.
Task description explicitly states: 'enter these 3 records' with three named patient records (Maria Gonzalez, James Thompson, Aisha Patel) fully described.
Task description explicitly lists these three case IDs paired with the three patient records.

CDC official Epi Info 7 User Guide (https://www.cdc.gov/epiinfo/user-guide/command-reference/check-commands-assign.html) documents that YEARS function requires TWO date parameters: YEARS(<var1>, <var2>). The metadata snippet is missing the required second parameter.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves Epi Info 7, a verified CDC epidemiological software suite. The task requires creating a synthetic project named 'RespSurveillance' (fictional project name, though respiratory disease surveillance is a real public health function). The three patient records and case IDs (RS-0001, RS-0002, RS-0003) are synthetic test data created for this training task. All data is created locally during task execution, not sourced from external databases. However, the check code snippet metadata contains an error: the YEARS function documented by CDC requires two date parameters (e.g., YEARS(DOB, SYSTEMDATE)), but the metadata claims only one parameter.
